productDisplayName: Puma Men Kevler Runner Black Sports Shoes
description: Look good and feel great with the Kevler Runner shoes from puma. These running shoes are built for performance and provide perfectly lightweight comfort. With sleek, stylish looks and a streamlined design, this shoe looks great when paired with casual wear too. UpperSynthetic and mesh upper for durability and breathablityLightweight flexible overlays for maximum performancePadded tongue and collar for enhanced comfortCentral lace-ups for a snug and customised Fitpuma logo printed on the tongue, collar and toe regionMidsolePhylon midsole provides soft underfoot plush for an absolute lightweight feelingEco-ortholite, padded foot-bed for all day comfort OutsoleRubber outsole with a notched heel cup that helps minimize irritationHigh-abrasion EverTrack outsole delivers long-lasting traction and gripImpact guidance line along the outsole for absolute shock absorptionShoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
